About This Platform

By Students, For Students

Who We Are

We are a group of students who understand how valuable previous question papers can be for exam preparation. This platform is built with the goal of helping fellow students access old question papers with ease, anytime, anywhere.

No more scattered files, endless searching, or broken links. Everything you need is organized and available in one place.

Our Mission

To make exam preparation easier by providing free, centralized access to previous year question papers for all students.

Community Driven

This platform grows with contributions from students like you. Share papers and help your juniors succeed.

Why Use This Site?

All Subjects, All Semesters
Easy Search & Filter
Download Anytime
Regularly Updated

Contribute Papers

Help your juniors by uploading question papers

Drop your PDF here or click to browse

Only PDF files are accepted

Have questions or want to contribute? We'd love to hear from you!

Feedback

Send Feedback

How to Contribute

  1. 1Email your scanned question papers to our address
  2. 2Include department, subject, semester, and year
  3. 3We'll review and add it to our archive within 24 hours

Paper Hub

Your one-stop solution for accessing previous years' question papers. Built by students, for students.
